title: Coed Llandyfan
summary: Coed Llandyfan is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales. It is an ancient semi-natural broadleaved wood near the small village of Llandyfan, and is 6.7 hectares (17 acres) in extent.
